notes: v357 — FIX: 'NOT LOADING ALL DATA'. If your loads were quietly leaving out whole groups of shares — most often the sub-$0.10 'Speculative' penny stocks — this fixes it. The 'What to load from the API' setting used to remember which types were TICKED, so any newer type (like Speculative) that didn't exist when you last saved a preset got dropped from every load. That also left your downloaded offline data incomplete, which forced slow share-by-share fetching (the 'slow' + the '?' cells). It now remembers only the types you deliberately switch OFF, so everything else — including types added in updates — loads by default. IMPORTANT one-time step: after updating, open Setup and run 'Download all (this exchange)' again so your saved data captures every type — that also restores fast loading. You can check the top bar shows about the full exchange count (e.g. ~2,900 for ASX) with '0 skipped by type'. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v357. ALSO RECENT — v356 the 📡 Market Radar no longer disappears on refresh + a 🔬 Research button in the top bar; v355 auto-pilot price band. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
